name: @cam-tuner/extension
description: CamTuner browser extension for webcam configuration

scripts.dev: node scripts/copy-mediapipe-wasm.mjs && node scripts/download-rvm-model.mjs && node scripts/build-mediapipe-adapter.mjs && wxt
scripts.dev:firefox: node scripts/copy-mediapipe-wasm.mjs && node scripts/download-rvm-model.mjs && node scripts/build-mediapipe-adapter.mjs && wxt -b firefox
scripts.build: node scripts/copy-mediapipe-wasm.mjs && node scripts/download-rvm-model.mjs && node scripts/build-mediapipe-adapter.mjs && wxt build
scripts.build:firefox: node scripts/copy-mediapipe-wasm.mjs && node scripts/download-rvm-model.mjs && node scripts/build-mediapipe-adapter.mjs && wxt build -b firefox
